summary: Frontend testing of Venue Comparison page at /owner/performance/venues. Complete rewrite with dual mode (Venue/Night) tested successfully. All 17 features passed - page loads, mode toggle, period filter, Venue mode chart and cards, Night mode chart and cards, mode switching.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1. This is a known Recharts issue when charts render before container has dimensions. Not blocking functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present and correctly named
Mode toggle works correctly with Building2 icon for Venue and Moon icon for Night
Period filter shows 5 pills (Today, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly, Custom) with Weekly active by default
VENUE MODE: Revenue Comparison chart renders with grouped blue (Revenue) and green (Profit) bars for 3 venues
VENUE MODE: Chart has TrendingUp icon, title 'Revenue Comparison', subtitle 'Side-by-side venue performance'
VENUE MODE: 3 venue cards (Downtown, Midtown, Uptown) in 3-column grid with all 6 metrics each
VENUE MODE: Downtown shows 'Top performer' badge (green), $72K revenue, $29K profit, 40.3% margin, 68% retention, 890 guests, +12.4% growth
VENUE MODE: Midtown shows 'Needs attention' badge (warning), $58K revenue
VENUE MODE: Uptown shows 'Underperforming' badge (red), $40K revenue, -5.2% growth
VENUE MODE: Cards have italic insight text and are clickable with hover effects
NIGHT MODE: Night Comparison chart with Moon icon header renders correctly
NIGHT MODE: 6 night cards in vertical list with correct data (Friday Night Live $8.4K, Saturday Bash $9.2K, etc.)
NIGHT MODE: Each card shows Calendar icon, night name, venue badge, revenue, and inline metrics
NIGHT MODE: Growth values are color-coded (green for positive, red for negative)
Mode toggle switches between Venue and Night modes correctly
seed_data_creation: Venue data from ownerData.js, Night data hardcoded inline in component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Comparison page fully tested. All features working: Mode toggle (Venue/Night), Period filter (5 pills), Venue mode with Revenue Comparison chart and 3 venue cards, Night mode with Night Comparison chart and 6 night cards. All data-testid attributes present. Chart dimension warnings are known Recharts issue, not blocking.

2_mode_toggle.details: Mode toggle shows Venue (Building2 icon) and Night (Moon icon), Venue active by default

3_period_filter.details: Period filter shows 5 pills (Today, Weekly, Monthly, Yearly, Custom) with Weekly active by default

4_venue_mode_chart.details: Revenue Comparison chart renders with grouped blue (Revenue) and green (Profit) bars for 3 venues

5_venue_mode_chart_header.details: Chart has TrendingUp icon, title 'Revenue Comparison', subtitle 'Side-by-side venue performance'

6_venue_mode_cards.details: 3 venue cards (Downtown, Midtown, Uptown) in 3-column grid with all 6 metrics each

7_downtown_card_details.details: Downtown shows 'Top performer' badge (green), $72K revenue, $29K profit, 40.3% margin, 68% retention, 890 guests, +12.4% growth

11_venue_cards_clickable.details: Cards are clickable with cursor-pointer and hover effects

12_switch_to_night_mode.details: Clicking Night mode toggle switches to Night mode correctly

13_night_mode_chart.details: Night Comparison chart with Moon icon header renders correctly

14_night_mode_cards.details: 6 night cards in vertical list (Friday Night Live $8.4K, Saturday Bash $9.2K, Thirsty Thursday $5.6K, Weekend Vibes $6.8K, Ladies Night $4.2K, Late Night Sessions $3.8K)

15_night_card_details.details: Each card shows Calendar icon, night name, venue badge, revenue, and inline metrics (Profit/Guests/Margin/Retention/Growth)

16_growth_color_coding.details: Growth values are color-coded (green for positive, red for negative)

17_switch_back_to_venue_mode.details: Mode toggle switches back to Venue mode correctly
